manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Primary Chilled Water Pump Design Speed by Stage
manual_entries.summary: Primary chilled water pumps should define a design speed setpoint for each operating stage that delivers design chilled-water flow through the active chillers.

zh.title: ASHRAE 分阶段一次冷冻水泵设计转速
zh.summary: 一次冷冻水泵应为每个运行阶段定义设计转速设定值，以保证运行中的冷水机组获得设计冷冻水流量。

structured_payload.parameter_name: 分阶段一次泵设计转速
structured_payload.measurement_context: 在某一运行阶段下，为运行冷水机组提供设计冷冻水流量所需的一次冷冻水泵转速
primary chilled water pump speed necessary to deliver design chilled water flow through the operating chillers in a stage

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Ch-MaxPriPumpSpdStage is the primary chilled water pump speed necessary to deliver design chilled water flow through the operating chillers in a stage.
chunk.text_excerpt: primary chilled water pump design speed by stage

evidence.evidence_text: Ch-MaxPriPumpSpdStage is defined as the primary chilled water pump speed necessary to deliver design chilled water flow, CHW-DesFlowX, through the operating chillers in a stage.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

manual_entries.title: ASHRAE Minimum Primary Chilled Water Pump Speed by Stage
manual_entries.summary: Primary chilled water pumps should define a minimum stage speed setpoint high enough to keep chiller flow above the minimum chilled-water flow requirement.

zh.title: ASHRAE 分阶段一次冷冻水泵最小转速
zh.summary: 一次冷冻水泵应定义足够高的分阶段最小转速设定值，以确保冷水机组流量始终高于最小冷冻水流量要求。

structured_payload.parameter_name: 分阶段一次泵最小转速
structured_payload.measurement_context: 在某一运行阶段下，为运行冷水机组提供最小冷冻水流量所需的一次冷冻水泵转速
primary chilled water pump speed necessary to deliver minimum chilled water flow through the operating chillers in a stage

doc.file_name: HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Ch-MinPriPumpSpdStage is established by reducing primary pump speed until chiller flow falls to 110% of CHW-MinFlowX.
chunk.text_excerpt: minimum primary chilled water pump speed by stage

evidence.evidence_text: Ch-MinPriPumpSpdStage is established by reducing primary pump speed until chiller flow falls to 110% of CHW-MinFlowX, then using that noted speed as the minimum stage setpoint.

source_manual.path: /Volumes/TSD302/19.暖通论文/英文文献/手册与标准/HVAC系统高性能运行序列指南.pdf
